rows.finalText: "What is the next right step in my calling" is best read here through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. Past opens with Snake (7), putting a nuanced approach beats blunt force in focus and setting the emotional weather around the reading. Snake colors your calling through mixed motives, inner conflict. Snake (7) with Book (26) keep emphasizing a blend of strategy and knowledge, asking you to separate signal from social noise while staying alert to withholding critical context.
